summary_one_line_zh: 小模型更能打，视频头像更实用，LLM 也开始被“工程化关进笼子”了
summary_one_line_en: Smaller models improve, avatar video gets practical, and LLM containment becomes an engineering discipline.

items.why_zh: 把模型当不可信执行体来围栏，直接影响工具调用、权限边界和多产品复用架构。
items.why_en: Treats the model as untrusted execution, reshaping tool access, permission boundaries, and reuse across products.
items.so_what_zh: 检查你们的 agent/tool 层，补上最小权限、输出过滤和跨产品隔离。
items.so_what_en: Audit your agent layer for least privilege, output filters, and cross-product isolation.

items.why_zh: 如果 8B 级模型能靠稀疏激活逼近更大模型，它会改写你们的吞吐、成本和部署边界。
items.why_en: If sparse activation makes 8B models feel much larger, it changes throughput, cost, and deployment constraints.
items.so_what_zh: 拿它和你线上 7B/8B 基线做一次相同提示集的延迟、成本和质量对比。
items.so_what_en: Benchmark it against your 7B/8B baseline on latency, cost, and quality.

items.why_zh: 视频驱动头像进入可产品化阶段，直接影响客服、陪伴、销售演示等前台交互形态。
items.why_en: Video avatars are becoming product-ready, affecting support, companion, and sales-demo interfaces.
items.so_what_zh: 用你们现有脚本跑一版 avatar demo，评估延迟、口型同步和失败回退。
items.so_what_en: Run your scripts through an avatar demo and measure latency, lip-sync, and fallback behavior.
